code: import axios from"axios";const API=axios.create({baseURL:process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||"http://localhost:5000/api"});API.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const userInfo=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("userInfo"));if(userInfo&&userInfo.token){config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(userInfo.token);}return config;});export default API;
